expectations: Review begins by establishing the scope and context of what artifact is being evaluated
Identified the race condition: multiple calls to processNext can interleave across await boundaries, bypassing the processing boolean guard
Identified the race condition as one of the most critical issues, explaining the potential impact (data corruption, lost events, or duplicate processing)
Identified that the pool processes events sequentially (one at a time), making it unable to handle 500 events/second throughput
Identified the unbounded results Map as a memory leak that grows without limit
Identified missing retry logic for failed webhook deliveries
Every major finding includes a proposed fix or mitigation, not just identification of the problem
Challenges are specific and actionable — citing exact lines or logic paths, not vague concerns
Findings are organized by severity with the most critical issues first and an overall assessment with verdict
Did NOT focus on code style, naming conventions, or formatting as primary findings
